subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-02-11
subcodes.first_line: This afternoon we passed by the nunnery and entered into its garden. The government forced the nuns to leave the country
subcodes.subjects: @monasticism; asceticism, @critique of Western values; culture, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @religion as source of love and unity
